permissions.FormsOverview: Access the Forms Overview tool — inventory of all Optimizely Forms with submissions, fields, usage and retention policy.
permissions.SubmissionsTimeline: Access the Submissions Timeline — cross-form chronological feed of recent form submissions.

formsoverview.title: Forms Overview
formsoverview.description: Every Optimizely Form on the site, with submission counts, last activity, where each form is used, and which retention policy applies.

submissionstimeline.title: Submissions Timeline
submissionstimeline.description: The most recent form submissions across the entire site, ordered chronologically and linked back to the form that received them.

formsoverview.empty: No forms match the current filters.
formsoverview.tip_open: Open form in CMS edit mode
formsoverview.tip_edit: Open form in CMS edit mode
formsoverview.tip_usage: Show where this form is used
formsoverview.flag_privacy_tip: Captures personal data and stores submissions on the default (indefinite) retention policy.
formsoverview.flag_privacy_live_tip: Published form that already holds submissions of personal data on the default (indefinite) retention policy — old personal data is likely retained.
formsoverview.flag_duplicate_tip: These field labels appear more than once and collide in the submission data:

submissionstimeline.empty: No submissions found in the selected range.
submissionstimeline.tip_view: Open this form's submission view in CMS
submissionstimeline.no_data: No data captured for this submission.
submissionstimeline.live_tip: Stream new submissions as they arrive

unusedformscheck.name: Unused Forms
unusedformscheck.description: Finds Optimizely Forms that are not referenced by any content on the site.
unusedformscheck.ok: Every form is referenced from at least one page or block.
unusedformscheck.found: {0} forms are not used anywhere on the site.

nonotificationhandlercheck.name: Forms Without Notification Handlers
nonotificationhandlercheck.description: Finds forms that receive submissions but have no email or webhook handler configured.
nonotificationhandlercheck.ok: Every form that receives submissions has at least one notification handler.
nonotificationhandlercheck.found: {0} forms have submissions but no email/webhook handler.

piiindefiniteretentioncheck.name: PII Stored Indefinitely
piiindefiniteretentioncheck.description: Finds forms that capture personal data on the default (effectively indefinite) retention policy.
piiindefiniteretentioncheck.ok: No forms with PII-shaped fields are stored on the default retention policy.
piiindefiniteretentioncheck.found: {0} forms capture PII-shaped fields on the default (indefinite) retention policy. Review for GDPR / privacy compliance.

duplicatefieldscheck.name: Forms With Duplicate Fields
duplicatefieldscheck.description: Finds forms with two or more input fields that share the same label, producing ambiguous submission columns.
duplicatefieldscheck.ok: No form has duplicate field labels.
